relations.note_zh: 董仲舒以灾异限制失道君主，蒋庆以三重合法性限制单一权力来源；二者都为政治权威设置超出事实掌控的规范尺度，但此处不主张历史影响。
relations.note_en: Dong Zhongshu's portents constrain a ruler who loses the Way, while Jiang Qing's threefold legitimacy constrains any single source of authority. Both place normative limits beyond de facto power; no historical influence is asserted.
relations.locator: 《汉书·董仲舒传》所录天人三策第三策，论灾异谴告段
relations.excerpt_text: 国家将有失道之败，而天乃先出灾害以谴告之；不知自省，又出怪异以警惧之；尚不知变，而伤败乃至。

relations.note_zh: 司马谈把六家置于共同的治道问题，梁启超以新民整合政治、教育与历史变革；两者都把思想分类导向公共治理，但不主张直接影响。
relations.note_en: Sima Tan places six schools within a shared problem of government, while Liang Qichao's renewal of the people joins politics, education, and historical change. Both orient intellectual classification toward public order; no direct influence is asserted.
relations.locator: 《史记·太史公自序》所录《论六家要旨》开篇
relations.excerpt_text: 夫阴阳、儒、墨、名、法、道德，此务为治者也，直所从言之异路，有省不省耳。

relations.note_zh: 司马迁以生命所趋判断死亡价值，谭嗣同以通释仁并赋予牺牲公共意义；两者都使人格价值超越个体保存。
relations.note_en: Sima Qian judges death by life's purpose, while Tan Sitong interprets ren as communication and gives sacrifice public meaning. Both place personal value beyond individual preservation.
relations.locator: 《汉书·司马迁传》所录《报任安书》“人固有一死”段
relations.excerpt_text: 人固有一死，或重于泰山，或轻于鸿毛，用之所趋异也。

relations.note_zh: 班昭在夫妇等级秩序内主张女子也应受教，何震则把性别压迫与资本、帝国及父权结构一并批判；二者在教育扩展与等级制度本身是否正当上形成鲜明对照。
relations.note_en: Ban Zhao advocates educating women within a hierarchical spousal order, whereas He Zhen jointly attacks gender subjugation, capitalism, imperialism, and patriarchy. They contrast expanded education with critique of the hierarchy itself.
relations.locator: 〈夫婦第二〉末段
relations.excerpt_text: 夫婦之道，參配陰陽，通達神明，信天地之弘義，人倫之大節也……但教男而不教女，不亦蔽於彼此之數乎？

relations.note_zh: 郑玄以既有礼体之完备界定成人，康有为的大同则设想废除国界和多重身份壁垒；二者在制度人格依赖既定礼分还是超越既定边界上构成张力。
relations.note_en: Zheng Xuan defines full personhood through completion of inherited ritual forms, while Kang Youwei's Great Unity abolishes national and other identity barriers. They contrast constituted ritual roles with institutional transcendence of boundaries.
relations.locator: 《禮記鄭氏注》卷十〈禮器第十〉，“禮也者猶體也”章郑注
relations.excerpt_text: 禮也者，猶體也。體不備，君子謂之不成人。

relations.note_zh: 桓谭用烛火比喻强调精神依赖形体，张君劢则以自由生命观限制科学因果解释的范围；二者构成身心依存自然论与自由精神论的比较张力。
relations.note_en: Huan Tan's candle analogy makes spirit dependent on form, whereas Zhang Junmai limits scientific causality before a free life-view. The link contrasts embodied naturalism with a philosophy of spiritual freedom.
relations.locator: 《弘明集》卷五《新论形神》，火烛譬喻段
relations.excerpt_text: 精神居形体，犹火之然烛矣……烛无，火亦不能独行于虚空。

relations.note_zh: 扬雄以修习使善恶混的人性获得方向，严复把民力、民智、民德视为国家养成条件；两者都把能力与德性理解为可培养而非固定禀赋。
relations.note_en: Yang Xiong directs mixed nature through cultivation, while Yan Fu treats popular strength, intelligence, and virtue as conditions to be developed for national power. Both understand capacity and virtue as cultivable rather than fixed endowment.
relations.locator: 《扬子法言·修身卷第三》“人之性也善恶混”章
relations.excerpt_text: 人之性也善恶混。修其善则为善人，修其恶则为恶人。

relations.note_zh: 王充以天地合气和万物自生解释现实，冯友兰以真际境界区分现实事物与形上原则；二者在自然生成是否需要独立形上层次上形成对照。
relations.note_en: Wang Chong explains reality through the conjunction of qi and spontaneous generation, while Feng Youlan distinguishes concrete things from a realm of the truly real. They contrast immanent natural generation with an independent metaphysical level.
relations.locator: 《论衡·自然》“天地合气”段
relations.excerpt_text: 天地合气，万物自生，犹夫妇合气，子自生矣。

relations.note_zh: 《淮南子》以无形之道包裹并禀授天地，熊十力以向内自证把握实在；两者都反对把终极实在当作外在对象，但认识路径不同。
relations.note_en: The Huainanzi's formless Dao encompasses and endows the cosmos, while Xiong Shili realizes reality through inward self-verification. Both reject ultimate reality as a merely external object, through different epistemic paths.
relations.locator: 《淮南子·原道训》开篇
relations.excerpt_text: 夫道者，覆天载地，廓四方，柝八极，高不可际，深不可测，包裹天地，禀授无形。

relations.note_zh: 李斯以王者不却众庶论国家强盛，康有为以废除国界构想最大范围的政治包容；两者都扩展成员边界，但一个服务帝国国家，一个指向世界共同体。
relations.note_en: Li Si grounds state strength in not rejecting the multitude, while Kang Youwei's abolition of national borders imagines maximal political inclusion. One serves an imperial state, the other a world community.
relations.locator: 《谏逐客书》第四、第五段
relations.excerpt_text: 太山不让土壤，故能成其大；河海不择细流，故能就其深；王者不却众庶，故能明其德。

relations.note_zh: 王符以民与生计说明国家所以成立，孙中山以民权论政治主权；两者都把人民置于国家正当性的中心，但前者重养民基础，后者重制度权能。
relations.note_en: Wang Fu grounds the state in people and subsistence, while Sun Yat-sen grounds sovereignty in popular rights. Both center the people in political legitimacy, one through livelihood and the other through institutional power.
relations.locator: 卷五〈愛日第十八〉开篇
relations.excerpt_text: 國之所以為國者，以有民也；民之所以為民者，以有穀也。穀之所以豐殖者，以有人功也；功之所以能建者，以日力也。

relations.note_zh: 灾异谴告与“去政治化”批判都拒绝把现存秩序视为自然而无需反省：前者诉诸天意，后者分析现代权力话语。关系仅为批判结构的比较。
relations.note_en: Portent remonstrance and the critique of depoliticization both refuse to treat an existing order as natural and beyond reflection, though one invokes Heaven and the other analyzes modern power discourse. This is structural comparison only.
relations.locator: 《汉书·董仲舒传》所录天人三策第三策，论灾异谴告段
relations.excerpt_text: 国家将有失道之败，而天乃先出灾害以谴告之；不知自省，又出怪异以警惧之；尚不知变，而伤败乃至。

relations.note_zh: 五行气化与当代阴阳关系生成论都把差异理解为关系过程中的生成，而非孤立实体的机械拼接；二者的历史语境与理论方法仍不同。
relations.note_en: Five-phase qi transformation and contemporary yin-yang relational generativity both understand difference as emerging within processes rather than as an assembly of isolated substances; their contexts and methods remain distinct.
relations.locator: 《春秋繁露·五行相生》第五十八
relations.excerpt_text: 天地之气，合而为一，分为阴阳，判为四时，列为五行。

relations.note_zh: 董仲舒的阴阳五行秩序与杜维明的人与宇宙嵌入论都反对把人割裂于天地过程；前者服务汉代政治宇宙论，后者是当代伦理重构。
relations.note_en: Dong Zhongshu's yin-yang and five-phase order and Tu Weiming's anthropocosmic embeddedness both resist separating humans from cosmic process; the former belongs to Han political cosmology, the latter to contemporary ethical reconstruction.
relations.locator: 《春秋繁露·五行相生》第五十八
relations.excerpt_text: 天地之气，合而为一，分为阴阳，判为四时，列为五行。

relations.note_zh: 司马谈把六家视为同趋于治而路径不同，张岱年以兼容综合处理理论差异；两者都承认分歧中的共同问题，但不等同其综合原则。
relations.note_en: Sima Tan treats the six schools as divergent routes toward government, while Zhang Dainian pursues inclusive synthesis across theories. Both locate shared problems amid disagreement without making their principles identical.
relations.locator: 《史记·太史公自序》所录《论六家要旨》开篇
relations.excerpt_text: 夫阴阳、儒、墨、名、法、道德，此务为治者也，直所从言之异路，有省不省耳。

relations.note_zh: 六家要旨的分类比较与张岱年的创造性综合都把思想史材料置于可比较的共同框架，不过前者为汉初学派论，后者回应现代哲学建构。
relations.note_en: The comparative classification of the six schools and Zhang Dainian's creative synthesis both place intellectual materials in a shared frame of comparison, though the former is an early-Han school survey and the latter a modern philosophical construction.
relations.locator: 《史记·太史公自序》所录《论六家要旨》开篇
relations.excerpt_text: 夫阴阳、儒、墨、名、法、道德，此务为治者也，直所从言之异路，有省不省耳。

relations.note_zh: 司马迁以生命所趋衡量死亡轻重，唐君毅强调人文精神的内在价值；两者都将人格目的置于生物存续之上，但论证语境不同。
relations.note_en: Sima Qian weighs death by the purpose toward which a life is directed, while Tang Junyi affirms the intrinsic value of humanistic spirit. Both place personal purpose above mere biological continuation, in different contexts.
relations.locator: 《汉书·司马迁传》所录《报任安书》“人固有一死”段
relations.excerpt_text: 人固有一死，或重于泰山，或轻于鸿毛，用之所趋异也。

relations.note_zh: “用之所趋”与王若水的现实社会实践的人都反对抽空具体行动来谈人的价值：前者是个人抉择，后者是社会哲学分析。
relations.note_en: Sima Qian's purpose-directed valuation and Wang Ruoshui's socially situated practical human both resist discussing human worth apart from concrete action; one concerns personal choice, the other social philosophy.
relations.locator: 《汉书·司马迁传》所录《报任安书》“人固有一死”段
relations.excerpt_text: 人固有一死，或重于泰山，或轻于鸿毛，用之所趋异也。

relations.note_zh: 班昭要求教育不应只及男子，艾思奇追求通俗哲学语言；两者都扩大知识教育的受众，不过班昭仍处在古代性别秩序之内。
relations.note_en: Ban Zhao argues that education should not reach boys alone, while Ai Siqi seeks a popular philosophical language. Both broaden educational audiences, although Ban Zhao remains within an ancient gender order.
relations.locator: 〈夫婦第二〉末段
relations.excerpt_text: 夫婦之道，參配陰陽，通達神明，信天地之弘義，人倫之大節也……但教男而不教女，不亦蔽於彼此之數乎？

relations.note_zh: 《女诫》在夫妇角色中论女性教育，陈来以关系性价值重释儒学；二者都重视关系，却在性别角色是否应被既定等级限定上形成可分析的张力。
relations.note_en: The Admonitions for Women discusses women's education within spousal roles, while Chen Lai reconstructs Confucian relational values. Both value relations but diverge over whether gendered roles should remain hierarchically fixed.
relations.locator: 〈夫婦第二〉末段
relations.excerpt_text: 夫婦之道，參配陰陽，通達神明，信天地之弘義，人倫之大節也……但教男而不教女，不亦蔽於彼此之數乎？

relations.note_zh: 郑玄以礼体成人，陈来强调价值在关系秩序中的优先性；两者都把人格形成理解为关系与规范的产物，而非孤立个体的自足属性。
relations.note_en: Zheng Xuan treats ritual embodiment as constitutive of the person, while Chen Lai prioritizes values embedded in relations. Both understand personhood as formed through relations and norms rather than isolated self-sufficiency.
relations.locator: 《禮記鄭氏注》卷十〈禮器第十〉，“禮也者猶體也”章郑注
relations.excerpt_text: 禮也者，猶體也。體不備，君子謂之不成人。

relations.note_zh: 郑玄的礼成人与白彤东的儒家混合政体都把制度礼法视为塑造政治主体的重要条件；前者为经注人伦论，后者是当代制度方案。
relations.note_en: Zheng Xuan's ritual constitution of persons and Bai Tongdong's Confucian hybrid regime both treat institutions and ritual norms as shaping political subjects; one is classical commentary, the other contemporary institutional theory.
relations.locator: 《禮記鄭氏注》卷十〈禮器第十〉，“禮也者猶體也”章郑注
relations.excerpt_text: 禮也者，猶體也。體不備，君子謂之不成人。

relations.note_zh: 桓谭以烛火说明精神不能脱离形体，方东美以生命场理解宇宙；二者都反对把生命精神看成脱离具体过程的实体，但理论尺度不同。
relations.note_en: Huan Tan's candle analogy denies that spirit exists apart from form, while Fang Dongmei understands the cosmos as a living field. Both reject disembodied spirit, though at different theoretical scales.
relations.locator: 《弘明集》卷五《新论形神》，火烛譬喻段
relations.excerpt_text: 精神居形体，犹火之然烛矣……烛无，火亦不能独行于虚空。

relations.note_zh: 扬雄以修善修恶说明混合人性的方向性，黄勇以自他一体论道德扩充；两者都把道德人格视为可实践转化而非固定本质。
relations.note_en: Yang Xiong gives mixed human nature a direction through cultivating good or evil, while Huang Yong develops self-other unity through moral extension. Both treat moral personhood as transformable in practice rather than fixed essence.
relations.locator: 《扬子法言·修身卷第三》“人之性也善恶混”章
relations.excerpt_text: 人之性也善恶混。修其善则为善人，修其恶则为恶人。

relations.note_zh: 扬雄的善恶混与唐君毅的感通心灵都拒绝把心性简化为静态属性，强调其在选择、情感与实践中展开。
relations.note_en: Yang Xiong's mixed nature and Tang Junyi's affective mind-world connection both resist reducing mind and nature to static properties, emphasizing their unfolding through choice, feeling, and practice.
relations.locator: 《扬子法言·修身卷第三》“人之性也善恶混”章
relations.excerpt_text: 人之性也善恶混。修其善则为善人，修其恶则为恶人。

relations.note_zh: 王充的天地合气、万物自生与当代阴阳关系生成论都以关系过程说明生成，区别在于前者的自然气论和后者的关系本体论诠释。
relations.note_en: Wang Chong's spontaneous generation through the conjunction of qi and contemporary yin-yang relational generativity both explain emergence through process; they differ as naturalistic qi theory and relational ontological interpretation.
relations.locator: 《论衡·自然》“天地合气”段
relations.excerpt_text: 天地合气，万物自生，犹夫妇合气，子自生矣。

relations.note_zh: 万物自生的气论与宇宙生命场都描写内在生成而非外在造物者的制作；二者分别属于汉代自然论与现代生命哲学。
relations.note_en: Qi-based spontaneous generation and the cosmos as a living field both portray immanent emergence rather than manufacture by an external creator; they belong respectively to Han naturalism and modern philosophy of life.
relations.locator: 《论衡·自然》“天地合气”段
relations.excerpt_text: 天地合气，万物自生，犹夫妇合气，子自生矣。

relations.note_zh: 王充以血脉精气消散否定死后知觉，杜维明则从人—宇宙嵌入重构人的精神意义；关系标示自然主义死亡论与当代人文宇宙论的张力。
relations.note_en: Wang Chong denies postmortem awareness through the dissipation of blood and vital energy, whereas Tu Weiming reconstructs human spiritual meaning through anthropocosmic embeddedness. The link marks a conceptual tension.
relations.locator: 《论衡·论死》开篇及人死不为鬼段
relations.excerpt_text: 人之所以生者，精气也；死而精气灭。能为精气者，血脉也；人死血脉竭，竭而精气灭，灭而形体朽，朽而成灰土，何用为鬼？

relations.note_zh: 《淮南子》以道包裹天地，张世英以差异与相通说明存在整体；两者都追问多样事物如何处于共同世界，但整体结构并不相同。
relations.note_en: The Huainanzi's Dao encompasses heaven and earth, while Zhang Shiying explains a whole through difference and interconnection. Both ask how diverse things inhabit a common world, without positing the same structure.
relations.locator: 《淮南子·原道训》开篇
relations.excerpt_text: 夫道者，覆天载地，廓四方，柝八极，高不可际，深不可测，包裹天地，禀授无形。

relations.note_zh: 《天文训》由虚霩、宇宙、气到清浊天地的分化，与当代阴阳关系生成论都将秩序理解为差异化过程，而不是预成实体的排列。
relations.note_en: The Tianwen xun moves from empty expanse through cosmos and qi to differentiated heaven and earth; contemporary yin-yang relational theory likewise treats order as a differentiating process rather than an arrangement of preformed entities.
relations.locator: 《淮南子·天文训》开篇
relations.excerpt_text: 道始于虚霩，虚霩生宇宙，宇宙生气。气有涯垠，清阳者薄靡而为天，重浊者凝滞而为地。

relations.note_zh: 李斯以不却众庶说明国家能力来自吸纳，白彤东以混合政体整合不同合法性机制；二者都讨论政治秩序如何容纳异质成分，但制度目标不同。
relations.note_en: Li Si grounds state capacity in not rejecting the multitude, while Bai Tongdong's hybrid regime combines distinct mechanisms of legitimacy. Both address political incorporation of heterogeneous elements, with different institutional aims.
relations.locator: 《谏逐客书》第四、第五段
relations.excerpt_text: 太山不让土壤，故能成其大；河海不择细流，故能就其深；王者不却众庶，故能明其德。

relations.note_zh: 王符以民与生计为国家成立之基，赵汀阳把天下而非国家作为政治单位；二者都要求从政治容器所承载的人群与共同生活反思秩序尺度。
relations.note_en: Wang Fu grounds the state in people and subsistence, while Zhao Tingyang takes all-under-heaven rather than the state as the political unit. Both rethink order from the people and shared life carried by political forms.
relations.locator: 卷五〈愛日第十八〉开篇
relations.excerpt_text: 國之所以為國者，以有民也；民之所以為民者，以有穀也。穀之所以豐殖者，以有人功也；功之所以能建者，以日力也。

relations.note_zh: 王符从民、谷与人功说明国家基础，王若水从现实社会实践说明人；两者都把政治与人的物质实践条件联系起来。
relations.note_en: Wang Fu explains the state's basis through people, grain, and labor, while Wang Ruoshui defines the human through real social practice. Both connect politics to material and practical human conditions.
relations.locator: 卷五〈愛日第十八〉开篇
relations.excerpt_text: 國之所以為國者，以有民也；民之所以為民者，以有穀也。穀之所以豐殖者，以有人功也；功之所以能建者，以日力也。

relations.note_zh: 郑玄以礼体之完备论成人，阮元从“相人偶”训仁；两者都借经学训释把人格与人际实践相连，此处仅作跨期概念比较。
relations.note_en: Zheng Xuan links complete ritual embodiment to becoming a person, while Ruan Yuan glosses ren through interpersonal pairing. Both use classical exegesis to connect personhood with relational practice; this is comparison only.
relations.locator: 《禮記鄭氏注》卷十〈禮器第十〉，“禮也者猶體也”章郑注
relations.excerpt_text: 禮也者，猶體也。體不備，君子謂之不成人。

relations.note_zh: 礼体成人与李塨的学习即践履都拒绝把伦理知识停留在抽象理解，强调身体化制度实践对人格形成的作用。
relations.note_en: Ritual embodiment constituting persons and Li Gong's learning-as-enactment both reject ethics as abstract understanding alone, emphasizing embodied institutional practice in forming character.
relations.locator: 《禮記鄭氏注》卷十〈禮器第十〉，“禮也者猶體也”章郑注
relations.excerpt_text: 禮也者，猶體也。體不備，君子謂之不成人。

relations.note_zh: 司马谈以六家分类书写思想传统，章学诚以六经皆史重构经典知识；二者都把思想置入历史分类与制度实践中。
relations.note_en: Sima Tan writes intellectual traditions through a classification of six schools, while Zhang Xuecheng reconstructs canonical knowledge through the thesis that the Six Classics are history. Both historicize organized knowledge.
relations.locator: 《史记·太史公自序》所录《论六家要旨》开篇
relations.excerpt_text: 夫阴阳、儒、墨、名、法、道德，此务为治者也，直所从言之异路，有省不省耳。

relations.note_zh: 司马迁按生命所趋衡量死亡，张栻强调义不以利为动机；两者都要求行动价值超越直接利害计算。
relations.note_en: Sima Qian evaluates death by the end toward which life is directed, while Zhang Shi insists righteousness not be motivated by profit. Both place the value of action beyond immediate calculation of advantage.
relations.locator: 《汉书·司马迁传》所录《报任安书》“人固有一死”段
relations.excerpt_text: 人固有一死，或重于泰山，或轻于鸿毛，用之所趋异也。

relations.note_zh: 桓谭以形体为精神所依，戴震以血气心知为一本；两者都拒绝心灵脱离身体气质而独立存在。
relations.note_en: Huan Tan makes form the condition of spirit, while Dai Zhen treats blood, vital energy, and knowing mind as one root. Both reject a mind existing independently of embodied constitution.
relations.locator: 《弘明集》卷五《新论形神》，火烛譬喻段
relations.excerpt_text: 精神居形体，犹火之然烛矣……烛无，火亦不能独行于虚空。

relations.note_zh: 扬雄以修习决定善恶混之性的走向，焦循以实践发展性之能力；两者都以养成过程反对固定化人性。
relations.note_en: Yang Xiong makes cultivation direct mixed nature toward good or evil, while Jiao Xun develops natural capacities through practice. Both oppose a fixed human nature by foregrounding formation.
relations.locator: 《扬子法言·修身卷第三》“人之性也善恶混”章
relations.excerpt_text: 人之性也善恶混。修其善则为善人，修其恶则为恶人。

relations.note_zh: 天地合气自生与邵雍的对应数象宇宙都以内在关系解释世界秩序，不过王充偏向自然生成，邵雍偏向象数结构。
relations.note_en: Spontaneous generation through the conjunction of qi and Shao Yong's correlative cosmology both explain order internally, though Wang Chong stresses natural generation and Shao Yong numerical-symbolic structure.
relations.locator: 《论衡·自然》“天地合气”段
relations.excerpt_text: 天地合气，万物自生，犹夫妇合气，子自生矣。

relations.note_zh: 包裹天地而禀授无形的道与王岱舆超越形数的真一都以无形根源说明有形秩序；两者属于道家宇宙论与伊斯兰哲学的不同传统。
relations.note_en: The formless Dao encompassing heaven and earth and Wang Daiyu's Real One beyond form and number both ground visible order in a nonvisible source, within distinct Daoist and Islamic philosophical traditions.
relations.locator: 《淮南子·原道训》开篇
relations.excerpt_text: 夫道者，覆天载地，廓四方，柝八极，高不可际，深不可测，包裹天地，禀授无形。

relations.note_zh: 清浊之气分化天地与叶适由两端落实一实，都从差异关系说明秩序形成，避免把“一”理解为抹平差别。
relations.note_en: The differentiation of clear and turbid qi into heaven and earth and Ye Shi's realization of one through paired terms both explain order through difference rather than an undifferentiated One.
relations.locator: 《淮南子·天文训》开篇
relations.excerpt_text: 道始于虚霩，虚霩生宇宙，宇宙生气。气有涯垠，清阳者薄靡而为天，重浊者凝滞而为地。

relations.note_zh: 王符以民为国之所以成立，黄宗羲以天下为主、君为客；两者都把政治秩序的目的由君主转向人民共同生活。
relations.note_en: Wang Fu makes the people the basis on which a state exists, while Huang Zongxi makes the world primary and the ruler a guest. Both redirect political purpose from ruler to common life.
relations.locator: 卷五〈愛日第十八〉开篇
relations.excerpt_text: 國之所以為國者，以有民也；民之所以為民者，以有穀也。穀之所以豐殖者，以有人功也；功之所以能建者，以日力也。

relations.note_zh: 僧肇以非有非无拒绝断灭空，冯友兰区分真际境界与经验对象；二者都要求超越朴素有无二分，但概念系统不同。
relations.note_en: Sengzhao's neither-being-nor-nonbeing rejects annihilationist emptiness, while Feng Youlan distinguishes the realm of the truly real from empirical objects. Both move beyond naïve being/nonbeing binaries within different systems.
relations.locator: T45, no. 1858, p. 152a-b，〈不真空論〉“万物果有其所以不有”段
relations.excerpt_text: 然則萬物果有其所以不有，有其所以不無。有其所以不有，故雖有而非有；有其所以不無，故雖無而非無。

relations.note_zh: 阮籍的大人以超越世俗礼法获得逍遥，李泽厚的主体性则形成于生产实践与历史积淀；两者在主体自由来自超越还是实践建构上构成对照。
relations.note_en: Ruan Ji's great person finds freedom beyond conventional ritual, whereas Li Zehou's subjectality is formed through productive practice and historical sedimentation. They contrast transcendence with practical construction of freedom.
relations.locator: 《大人先生傳》开篇及答君子书段
relations.excerpt_text: 夫大人者，乃與造物同體，天地並生，逍遙浮世，與道俱成……養性延壽，與自然齊光。

relations.note_zh: 慧远以方外身份论证僧团不受王者礼制完全支配，蒋庆则把天、地、人三重合法性制度化；二者对宗教超越与政治制度边界给出不同安排。
relations.note_en: Huiyuan's extra-mundane status protects the monastic community from full subjection to royal ritual, while Jiang Qing institutionalizes three sources of political legitimacy. They arrange the religious-political boundary differently.
relations.locator: T52, no. 2102, 卷5〈沙門不敬王者論·出家第二〉
relations.excerpt_text: 出家則是方外之賓，迹絕於物……是故凡在出家，皆遁世以求其志，變俗以達其道。

relations.note_zh: 道生的一切众生皆可成佛与杜维明的人—宇宙嵌入论都扩大主体的关系潜能，前者论成佛普遍性，后者论人文生态伦理。
relations.note_en: Daosheng's universal possibility of buddhahood and Tu Weiming's anthropocosmic embeddedness both enlarge relational potential, the former soteriological and the latter humanistic-ecological.
relations.locator: X27, no. 577, 卷1，〈見寶塔品第十一〉（CBETA PDF 印本第26页）
relations.excerpt_text: 既云三乘是一，一切眾生莫不是佛，亦皆泥洹。

relations.note_zh: 吉藏把二谛视为相待假名的言教，劳思光以基源问题组织哲学史；两者都把哲学概念当作教学与分析工具而非僵硬实体。
relations.note_en: Jizang treats the two truths as relational pedagogical designations, while Lao Sze-kwang organizes philosophy through fundamental questions. Both use concepts as tools of instruction and analysis rather than rigid entities.
relations.locator: T45, no. 1854, 卷1〈釋名第一〉开篇
relations.excerpt_text: 二諦者，蓋是言教之通詮，相待之假稱。

relations.note_zh: 窥基以唯识遮外境实有而不空心识，冯契以广义认识论贯通知识与智慧；两者都反对把认识论简化为外物摹写，但论证传统不同。
relations.note_en: Kuiji's consciousness-only denies independently existing objects without nihilating cognition, while Feng Qi's broad epistemology connects knowledge and wisdom. Both resist reducing knowing to copying external things, within different traditions.
relations.locator: T43, no. 1830, 卷1，p. 229a-b，序释“唯识”名义段
relations.excerpt_text: 唯遮境有，識簡心空。

relations.note_zh: 玄奘量式把色与眼识的不可分离置入严格论证，李达把辩证法、逻辑与认识论统一于实践哲学；两者都重视论证形式与认识条件的结合。
relations.note_en: Xuanzang's inference rigorously argues that color is not separable from visual consciousness, while Li Da unifies dialectics, logic, and epistemology in practical philosophy. Both connect argumentative form with conditions of knowing.
relations.locator: T44, no. 1840, 卷上，疏释“真故极成色”量式段
relations.excerpt_text: 真故極成色，定不離眼識；自許初三攝，眼所不攝故，猶如眼識。

relations.note_zh: 智顗一念三千与张世英的差异相通都说明整体并不取消内部差异：一念具多重世界，存在整体由差异关系展开。
relations.note_en: Zhiyi's three thousand worlds in one thought and Zhang Shiying's difference-and-interconnection both describe wholes that do not erase internal differences: multiplicity is present through structured relations.
relations.locator: T46, no. 1911, p. 54a5-10，卷5〈正修止觀·觀不思議境〉
relations.excerpt_text: 夫一心具十法界，一法界又具十法界百法界；一界具三十種世間，百法界即具三千種世間。此三千在一念心。

relations.note_zh: 菩提达摩二入把理悟与四行并列，黄勇由自他一体展开伦理实践；两者都要求内在认识落实为实践路径。
relations.note_en: Bodhidharma's two entrances coordinate insight into principle with four practices, while Huang Yong unfolds ethics from self-other unity. Both require inner understanding to become a practical path.
relations.locator: PDF第141页，《二入四行论》本文开篇“夫入道多途”至“四行”目录
relations.excerpt_text: 夫入道多途，要而言之，不出二種：一是理入，二是行入。……行入者，所謂四行。

relations.note_zh: 阮籍以超越礼俗追求个体逍遥，章太炎以革命破除习惯并生成公共理性；两者都批判既成规范，却分别走向退离与集体政治变革。
relations.note_en: Ruan Ji seeks personal freedom beyond ritual convention, while Zhang Taiyan uses revolution to remove custom and generate public reason. Both criticize established norms but move toward withdrawal and collective transformation respectively.
relations.locator: 《大人先生傳》开篇及答君子书段
relations.excerpt_text: 夫大人者，乃與造物同體，天地並生，逍遙浮世，與道俱成……養性延壽，與自然齊光。

relations.note_zh: 慧远以方外僧团突破王权礼制的单一辖域，康有为设想废除国界的大同世界；两者都想象超出既有政治边界的共同体，规模与依据不同。
relations.note_en: Huiyuan's extra-mundane monastic community exceeds a single sphere of royal ritual, while Kang Youwei imagines a Great Unity beyond national borders. Both envision communities beyond existing political boundaries on different scales.
relations.locator: T52, no. 2102, 卷5〈沙門不敬王者論·出家第二〉
relations.excerpt_text: 出家則是方外之賓，迹絕於物……是故凡在出家，皆遁世以求其志，變俗以達其道。

relations.note_zh: 一切众生皆可成佛与谭嗣同以通释仁都突破封闭身份，把价值实现建立在普遍可达或普遍相通之上。
relations.note_en: Universal buddhahood and Tan Sitong's ren as communication both break closed identities, grounding value in universally accessible transformation or interconnection.
relations.locator: X27, no. 577, 卷1，〈見寶塔品第十一〉（CBETA PDF 印本第26页）
relations.excerpt_text: 既云三乘是一，一切眾生莫不是佛，亦皆泥洹。

relations.note_zh: 吉藏把二谛视为相待言教，胡适以大胆假设、小心求证规范探究；二者都将概念视为解决问题的暂时工具，而非不可修正的实体。
relations.note_en: Jizang treats the two truths as relational teachings, while Hu Shi regulates inquiry through hypotheses and verification. Both treat concepts as revisable tools for problems rather than unrevisable entities.
relations.locator: T45, no. 1854, 卷1〈釋名第一〉开篇
relations.excerpt_text: 二諦者，蓋是言教之通詮，相待之假稱。

relations.note_zh: 窥基在唯识论中既遮外境实有又避免心空，熊十力以智的非二元性重构认识；两者都试图超越主客二分而不落虚无。
relations.note_en: Kuiji's consciousness-only denies independent objects without emptying cognition, while Xiong Shili reconstructs knowing as nondual wisdom. Both move beyond subject-object dualism without falling into nihilism.
relations.locator: T43, no. 1830, 卷1，p. 229a-b，序释“唯识”名义段
relations.excerpt_text: 唯遮境有，識簡心空。

relations.note_zh: 玄奘量式说明色不离眼识，张东荪强调知识受文化与语言中介；两者都拒绝未经中介的对象直呈论，但中介机制不同。
relations.note_en: Xuanzang's inference argues that color is not separable from visual consciousness, while Zhang Dongsun emphasizes cultural and linguistic mediation of knowledge. Both reject unmediated presentation of objects, with different mechanisms.
relations.locator: T44, no. 1840, 卷上，疏释“真故极成色”量式段
relations.excerpt_text: 真故極成色，定不離眼識；自許初三攝，眼所不攝故，猶如眼識。

relations.note_zh: 《系辞》塑造的伏羲观象制卦与成中英本体诠释学都把理解建立在世界模式与符号解释的往复中；关系比较的是后世文本形象，不把传说人物当作可证作者。
relations.note_en: The Xici image of Fuxi observing patterns to make trigrams and Cheng Chung-ying's onto-hermeneutics both situate understanding in interplay between world patterns and symbolic interpretation. The legendary figure is not treated as a verifiable author.
relations.locator: 《周易·系辞下》第二章，包牺氏作八卦段
relations.excerpt_text: 古者包牺氏之王天下也，仰则观象于天，俯则观法于地……于是始作八卦，以通神明之德，以类万物之情。

relations.note_zh: 《淮南子》的神农叙事以亲尝和因地比较获得利民知识，毛泽东以实践检验真理；两者都连接知识、试验与实际效用，但前者是汉代文化记忆。
relations.note_en: The Huainanzi narrative of Shennong gains publicly useful knowledge through testing and local comparison, while Mao Zedong tests truth in practice. Both link knowledge, experiment, and practical effect; the former is a Han cultural memory.
relations.locator: 《淮南子·修务训》神农教民播种、尝百草段
relations.excerpt_text: 神农乃始教民播种五谷，相土地宜，燥湿肥硗高下，尝百草之滋味、水泉之甘苦，令民知所辟就。

relations.note_zh: 《内经》黄帝问答传统把身体调养置于四时天地秩序中，杜维明以人—宇宙嵌入重构伦理；两者都连接身体、自然与规范，且不把黄帝视为可证作者。
relations.note_en: The Inner Canon's Yellow Emperor dialogue places bodily cultivation within seasonal cosmic order, while Tu Weiming reconstructs ethics through anthropocosmic embeddedness. Both connect body, nature, and norm; the Yellow Emperor is not treated as a verifiable author.
relations.locator: 《黄帝内经素问·上古天真论》第一节，黄帝问、岐伯答段
relations.excerpt_text: 岐伯对曰：上古之人，其知道者，法于阴阳，和于术数，食饮有节，起居有常，不妄作劳，故能形与神俱。

relations.note_zh: 《尧典》的圣王形象以明德亲族而协和万邦，蒋庆以天、地、人三重来源论政治合法性；两者都使权威接受多层规范评价，前者只是后世文本形象。
relations.note_en: The Yao Canon's sage-king extends bright virtue from kin to the myriad states, while Jiang Qing grounds legitimacy in heavenly, historical, and popular sources. Both subject authority to layered norms; the former is a later textual image.
relations.locator: 《尚书·虞书·尧典》开篇“克明俊德”段
relations.excerpt_text: 克明俊德，以亲九族。九族既睦，平章百姓。百姓昭明，协和万邦。

relations.note_zh: 《舜典》文本形象以诗乐调和性情并成教，李泽厚以文化积淀说明审美身体；两者都把艺术视为长期塑造情感与人格的实践。
relations.note_en: The Shun Canon's textual image uses poetry and music to harmonize dispositions and educate, while Li Zehou explains the aesthetic body through cultural sedimentation. Both treat art as a practice shaping feeling and character over time.
relations.locator: 《尚书·虞书·舜典》第十六节，命夔典乐段
relations.excerpt_text: 命汝典乐，教胄子：直而温，宽而栗，刚而无虐，简而无傲。

relations.note_zh: 《大禹谟》的禹形象把善政落实为安民养民，赵汀阳以天下为政治单位处理共同世界；两者都从共同生活而非统治者自身界定秩序目的。
relations.note_en: The Yu image in the Counsels of Great Yu realizes good government through securing and nourishing the people, while Zhao Tingyang takes all-under-heaven as a unit of shared political life. Both define order from common life rather than the ruler alone.
relations.locator: 《尚书·虞书·大禹谟》第六节，禹曰“德惟善政”段
relations.excerpt_text: 禹曰：“德惟善政，政在养民。水、火、金、木、土、谷，惟修；正德、利用、厚生，惟和。”

relations.note_zh: 慎到以因任自然、随势必要弱化个人意志，王晖批判权力把历史选择自然化为无可争议；二者围绕“必然性”形成接受与揭露的反向张力。
relations.note_en: Shen Dao minimizes personal will by following circumstance and necessity, while Wang Hui criticizes power for naturalizing historical choices as uncontestable. They form an analytical contrast over political necessity.
relations.locator: 《庄子·天下》慎到、彭蒙、田骈论述段
relations.excerpt_text: 是故慎到，弃知去己，而缘不得已，泠汰于物以为道理。

relations.note_zh: 邹衍五德终始以宇宙模式解释历史更替，张岱年以创造性综合理解现代思想建构；两者都为历史变化寻找总体框架，但一个循环对应，一个开放综合。
relations.note_en: Zou Yan's succession of the five powers explains dynastic change through cosmological pattern, while Zhang Dainian frames modern thought through creative synthesis. Both seek a general account of change, one cyclical-correlative and one open and synthetic.
relations.locator: 《史记·孟子荀卿列传》邹衍传，述五德转移段
relations.excerpt_text: 称引天地剖判以来，五德转移，治各有宜，而符应若兹。
